---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea, enhancement, or new feature for Amana
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use Case / Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem or specific use case? Please describe clearly (e.g. "I'm frustrated when...").

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen or the feature you would like to see implemented.

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Implementation Details / Technical Ideas
Optionally describe how this might be implemented (e.g. smart contract modifications, backend API endpoints, frontend UI components).

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or design mockups about the feature request here.
